relationship: 手紙を書く主人公と記憶の声
setting: 手紙を書く主人公の元に、記憶の彼女の声が重なるポエティックな掛け合い
lyrics:
Now, just now I know that I'm happy
because you're here with me
You, just you is what I really need
and all the other thought means nothing to me

‘Love’ is the word I really need
because all the other word means nothing to me
‘Love’ is the word I really need because
all the other words just make me tell lies

By my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side, by my side
Stay by my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side by my side

Now, just now I know that I'm lonely
because you're away from me
You, about you, about me is about you
and I'll repeat the same verses over
and over and over again until you're back to me

‘Love’ is the word I really need
so all of these affections need a place where to go
‘Love’ is the word I really need
so please will you come back and kiss on my cheek

By my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side, by my side
Stay by my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side by my side

流るる意志を以て　動かぬ意味を越え
僕には二つ心臓がある　君を思うと動き出すのが…

By my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side, by my side

By my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side, by my side
Stay by my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side by my side…

You told me that you're mine and you always kissed me
instead of ‘Hi’ /But this doesn't mean
that I'm head over toes in with you
whatever/You used to beg me hug
and you used to play me tricks and
all those hugs and tricks we shared is now
what we call a broken dreams/I hate myself
when my brain tells me that I'm lying everything
we went through was just a waste of a time
so I'm writing this for you and I'm writing this for me
within full of thanks and tears, and a pair of ring
full of“ I love you”/this song will almost end but
that doesn't mean us too/well, just in case someday
you come to me and says “Hi”

lyricsJa.en:
Now, just now I know that I'm happy
because you're here with me
You, just you is what I really need
and all the other thought means nothing to me
lyricsJa.ja:
今、まさに今、僕は幸せなんだと分かったよ
君が一緒にいてくれるから
君なんだ、僕が本当に必要なのは君だけなんだ
他の考えなんて、僕には何の意味もないよ

lyricsJa.en:
‘Love’ is the word I really need
because all the other word means nothing to me
‘Love’ is the word I really need because
all the other words just make me tell lies
lyricsJa.ja:
『愛』こそが僕が一番必要としている言葉だよ
他の言葉なんて何の意味もないから
『愛』こそが僕に必要な言葉さ
それ以外の言葉はただ僕に嘘をつかせるだけだから

lyricsJa.en:
By my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side, by my side
Stay by my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side by my side
lyricsJa.ja:
僕のそばに、そばにいてよ
ずっと僕のそばにいてほしい
そばにいて、そばにいてよ

lyricsJa.en:
Now, just now I know that I'm lonely
because you're away from me
You, about you, about me is about you
and I'll repeat the same verses over
and over and over again until you're back to me
lyricsJa.ja:
今、まさに今、僕は寂しいんだと分かったよ
君が離れていってしまったから
君は、君のことは…僕のことは君のことで
君が戻ってくるまで、同じフレーズを何度も何度も繰り返して歌うよ

lyricsJa.en:
‘Love’ is the word I really need
so all of these affections need a place where to go
‘Love’ is the word I really need
so please will you come back and kiss on my cheek
lyricsJa.ja:
『愛』こそが僕が一番必要としている言葉だよ
この溢れる想いには、行き場が必要なんだ
『愛』こそが僕に必要な言葉さ
だからお願い、戻ってきて僕の頬にキスをしてくれないか

lyricsJa.en:
By my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side, by my side
Stay by my side, by my side, by my side,
stay by my side by my side
lyricsJa.ja:
僕のそばに、そばにいてよ
ずっと僕のそばにいてほしい
そばにいて、そばにいてよ

lyricsJa.en:
流るる意志を以て　動かぬ意味を越え
僕には二つ心臓がある　君を思うと動き出すのが…
lyricsJa.ja:
流るる意志を以て　動かぬ意味を越え
僕には二つ心臓がある　君を思うと動き出すのが…

lyricsJa.en:
By my side... 
Stay by my side...
lyricsJa.ja: 僕のそばに、ずっとそばにいてほしい…

lyricsJa.en:
You told me that you're mine and you always kissed me instead of ‘Hi’
But this doesn't mean that I'm head over toes in with you whatever
You used to beg me hug and you used to play me tricks
and all those hugs and tricks we shared is now what we call a broken dreams
lyricsJa.ja:
君は「私はあなたのもの」と言って、挨拶の代わりにいつもキスをしてくれたね
でもそれが、僕が君にゾッコンだって意味じゃないからね、別に
君はよくハグをねだって、よく僕にイタズラをしてきた
でも、そんなハグもイタズラも、今じゃ僕らが口にする「壊れた夢」になってしまった

lyricsJa.en:
I hate myself when my brain tells me that I'm lying
everything we went through was just a waste of a time
so I'm writing this for you and I'm writing this for me
within full of thanks and tears, and a pair of ring full of “I love you”
lyricsJa.ja:
「僕らが過ごした時間なんて無駄だったよ」と強がって嘘をつく自分が嫌になる
だから、君のために、そして僕自身のためにこれを書いているよ
溢れる感謝と涙、そして「愛してる」がいっぱい詰まったペアリングと共に

lyricsJa.en:
this song will almost end but that doesn't mean us too
well, just in case someday you come to me and says “Hi”
lyricsJa.ja:
この歌はもうすぐ終わるけど、僕らが終わるって意味じゃない
まぁ、念のためね。いつか君が僕のもとにやってきて、あの時のように「やあ」って言ってくれる時のために。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Now, just now I know that I'm lonely.
sentences.displayHtml: Now, just now I know that I'm lonely.

sentences.text: Why did you have to go?
sentences.displayHtml: Why did you have to go?

conversation.japanese: 今、まさに今の自分が孤独なんだって分かったよ。なんで行っちゃったんだよ？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: But you're so far away from me now.
sentences.displayHtml: But you're so far away from me now.

conversation.japanese: 行きたくなかった。でも今のあなたは、私からとても遠いところにいるから。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: You used to beg me hug and play me tricks.
sentences.displayHtml: You used to beg me hug and play me tricks.

sentences.text: Now it's just a broken dream.
sentences.displayHtml: Now it's just a broken dream.

conversation.japanese: 君はよくハグをねだって、よくイタズラをしてきたね。今じゃただの壊れた夢みたいだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: We used to kiss instead of saying "Hi".
sentences.displayHtml: We used to kiss instead of saying "Hi".

conversation.japanese: 覚えてるよ。私たち、挨拶の代わりにいつもキスをしてたよね。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Sometimes I tell myself I'm not head over toes in with you.
sentences.displayHtml: Sometimes I tell myself I'm not head over toes in with you.

sentences.text: But I hate myself for lying.
sentences.displayHtml: But I hate myself for lying.

conversation.japanese: 時々、「君にそこまでゾッコンじゃない」って自分に言い聞かせてる。でも、強がって嘘をついている自分が嫌になるんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Was everything we went through just a waste of a time?
sentences.displayHtml: Was everything we went through just a waste of a time?

conversation.japanese: 私たちが一緒に過ごした時間って、ただの時間の無駄だったのかな？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: That's why I'm writing this with a pair of rings full of "I love you".
sentences.displayHtml: That's why I'm writing this with a pair of rings full of "I love you".

conversation.japanese: いや、絶対に違う。だから、「愛してる」がいっぱい詰まったペアリングと一緒に、これを君に向けて書いてるんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Just in case someday I come to you and say "Hi".
sentences.displayHtml: Just in case someday I come to you and say "Hi".

conversation.japanese: 心に留めておくわ。いつか私があなたのところに行って、もう一度「やあ」って言う時のためにね。
